message.content:
The page displays a design/branding document for the 'Wesal' social media platform, with a light blue (#87CEEB or similar soft blue) background. The layout consists of two main rectangular sections:  

1. **Left Section**: A dark navy blue (#1E3A5F or similar deep blue) rectangle.  
   - Top-left: A black QR code (standard square matrix code).  
   - Center: Arabic text "وسال" in white, stylized font.  
   - Bottom-left: Three lines of white text:  
     - "+20 10 409 456 55" (phone number)  
     - "www.wesal.com" (website)  
     - "wesal@gmail.com" (email)  
   - Bottom-right: A white heart-shaped logo with an interlocking design (matching the logo on the right section).  

2. **Right Section**: A light cyan (#E0F7FA or similar pale blue) rectangle.  
   - Center: Arabic text "وسال" in a teal (#5F9EA0 or similar muted blue-green) stylized font.  
   - Below the Arabic text: The word "wesal" in lowercase, teal font.  
   - Right of the text: A light blue (#87CEEB or similar soft blue) heart-shaped logo with an interlocking design (three loops forming a symmetrical pattern inside the heart).  

The two rectangles are positioned side-by-side, with the left rectangle slightly lower than the right one, creating a balanced, modern layout. The overall design emphasizes brand consistency through repeated logo elements and color coordination.
